<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Enforce repeated argument type style. Strider default: any style.

## Bad

```go
func add(left int, right int) int // with short style configured
```

## Good

```go
func add(left, right int) int // with short style configured
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only enforce-repeated-arg-type-style`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
